New Perplexity Comet update is insane. Your browser just got replaced. Perplexity just dropped something called Comet on iPhone and it is not a browser. It is an AI that uses the internet for you. Today I am going to show you exactly how it works, why it changes everything and how you can use it right now to save hours every single day. This is big, this is new and honestly this is kind of scary for Google. So let me break this down real quick. Perplexity, the AI search company, they just launched Comet on iOS. That means iPhone, that means your pocket and this is not just some little app update. This is a full AI browser that does stuff for you, not with you. For you, think about that for a second. Right now, when you use Chrome or Safari, what do you do? You type something in, you get 10 blue links, you click one, you read it, you go back, you click another one, you copy, paste stuff, you open five tabs, you forget which tab had what. Sound familiar? Yeah, that whole process is dead now. Comet works completely different. You just tell it what you want. In plain English, like you are talking to a person, you say summarize this page, it does it. You say compare these two products, it does it. You say turn this into an email, done. You say find me the best laptops and show me which one to pick, it just does the whole thing for you. No tabs, no clicking around, no wasted time and here is where it gets really wild. This is not just search, this is what they call agentic AI. That means the AI does not just find information, it takes action. It can book things, it can fill out forms, it can do multi-step tasks. Like you could say research the best flights to Dubai, compare them and draft me an email with the top three options and it will do all of that in one go without you lifting a finger. Now let me give you some context on why the iOS launch matters so much. Comet was already on desktop, Mac and Windows since July last year, then it came to Android in November, but iPhone was the missing piece and now it is here. That means Comet is fully cross-platform. Desktop, Android, iPhone, everywhere. And think about what that unlocks. You start researching something on your laptop at work, you leave, you pull out your phone, pick up right where you left off. The AI follows you. Your assistant is always with you. That is a game-changer for anyone who works on the go. Hey, if we have not met already, I am the digital avatar of Julian Goldie, CEO of Goldie Agency. While he is helping clients get more leads and customers, I am here to help you get the latest AI updates. Julian Goldie reads every comment, so make sure you comment below. Drop a comment right now and tell me, would you switch from Chrome to this? I want to know. Okay, so let me talk about what this actually means for you day-to-day uh because features are cool, but results are what matter, right? If you are a student, this thing is insane for research. You do not have to open 20 tabs and read through 10 articles anymore. You just ask Comet to find what you need, summarize it, pull out the key points and organize it. What used to take you 2 hours now it takes 5 minutes. I am not even exaggerating. If you are a creator like me, think about how much time you spend researching for scripts, for posts, for content ideas, Comet can do that research, pull the best stuff and even help you draft outlines, all inside the browser. You do not need to switch between five different apps anymore. If you run a business, this is where it gets really powerful. You can automate workflows that used to eat up your whole morning researching competitors, pulling data, comparing options, drafting responses, Comet handles it and it is all happening right inside your browser. No extra tools, no extra subscriptions to a bunch of random apps. Now here is something I want you to think about and this is a big open loop, so stay with me. The way we use the internet is about to completely change, like fundamentally change. Right now you go to the internet and you do the work, you search, you click, you read, you decide, but with agentic AI browsers like Comet, the AI goes to the internet for you. You just tell it what you need and it comes back with the answer or even better, it comes back with the task already done. Okay, let me keep going because I have not even covered the best part yet. So let me compare Comet to what you are probably using right now, Chrome, Safari, maybe Brave or Arc. Here is the difference, those browsers are passive, they sit there and wait for you to do stuff. You do all the work. Comet is active. It is like having a smart assistant built right into your browser that is ready to help you the second you need it. Chrome is great loading web pages, that is about it. Safari is fast on Apple devices. Cool. But neither of them can summarize a page for you, neither of them can take a 10-step research task and do it automatically. Neither of them can turn what you are reading into an email or a report or a comparison chart. Comet does all of that and look, I want to be real with you because I always keep it honest on this channel, Comet is not perfect. It's still early, the mobile experience is still being polished, some of the advanced features might need a subscription and it is not going to replace every app on your phone tomorrow, but the direction it is going in is clear. This is the future of how we use the internet. Think about it like this, 10 years ago nobody had a smartphone, now everyone does. 5 years ago nobody used AI in their daily life, now everyone does. 2 years from now I honestly believe you will not browse the internet yourself anymore. AI will do it for you and tools like Comet are the first real step toward that. Now here is what makes this even more interesting. Apple has not done this yet, Apple has Siri, Apple has some AI features, but Apple does not have a full agentic AI browser. And now Perplexity just put one on the iPhone, right on Apple's home turf. That is bold and it tells you something. The companies that move fast with AI are going to win, the ones that move slow are going to get left behind. So what should you actually do with this information? Here is my advice, go download Comet right now. It is on the App Store, try it, play with it, ask it to summarize the page, ask it to compare two things, ask it to do a multi-step task, just test it out because the people who learn these tools early are the ones who get the biggest advantage, always. So now I want to leave you with this thought, every single time a new technology wave hits, most people wait, they watch from the sidelines, they say oh I will try it later and then later comes and they are behind everyone else. Do not be that person. The AI wave is here, tools like Perplexity Comet are proof of that. Get in now, learn it now, use it now.
